title: RFE: support port binding in rootless mode
body:
[//]:  **kind feature**



**Description**

port bindings are not currently supported with rootless containers. Let this issue be a tracker for that feature/work. 

```
[dustymabe@hattop ~]$ podman run -it --rm -p 8888:80 t-systemdtest 
port bindings are not yet supported by rootless containers
```


**Output of `podman version`:**

```
[dustymabe@hattop ~]$ podman version
Version:       0.12.1.1
Go Version:    go1.11.2
Git Commit:    "0c9259a2c84f6234a29dcd78674c3f4837fd3101"
Built:         Fri Dec  7 14:29:27 2018
OS/Arch:       linux/amd64
[dustymabe@hattop ~]$ rpm -q podman
podman-0.12.1.1-1.git66d3499.fc29.x86_64
```

comments.body: @giuseppe Any word on this being added to slirp4netns?
There is already work going on there. As soon as it is supported by slirp4netns, I will add the missing pieces here

I tried this using podman-1.0.1-1549574078.git962850c6.fc29.x86_64 from baude/Upstream_CRIO_Family COPR:
$ podman --log-level=debug run --name thelounge --publish 9000:9000 --volume ~/.thelounge:/var/opt/thelounge thelounge/thelounge:3.0.0-alpine

...
DEBU[0000] Created container 56af61555d6e138f0ee4bea5fbc124ef3fb14df638244bb2837e963a6737821d in OCI runtime 
DEBU[0001] Cleaning up container 56af61555d6e138f0ee4bea5fbc124ef3fb14df638244bb2837e963a6737821d 
DEBU[0001] Network is already cleaned up, skipping...   
DEBU[0001] unmounted container "56af61555d6e138f0ee4bea5fbc124ef3fb14df638244bb2837e963a6737821d" 
ERRO[0003] slirp4netns failed  

How do I get debug log from slirp4netns ?
@apevec what version of slirp4netns are you using?

a-ha, that was it!
baude/Upstream_CRIO_Family/ does not include updated slirp4netns so it was the one from F29: slirp4netns-0.1-2.dev.git0037042.fc29.x86_64

Works with v0.3.0-alpha.2 !

I've sent https://src.fedoraproject.org/rpms/slirp4netns/pull-request/1
and podman might now need Recommends: slirp4netns >= 0.3.0
CC @lsm5

BTW for anyone testing with baude/Upstream_CRIO_Family COPR, after enabling it you need to run
```
# dnf downgrade podman-1.0.1
```
since Fedora podman RPM has Epoch and COPR build doesn't.
This also means COPR build will be replaced by regular Fedora one after next dnf update
CC @baude

@apevec I confirm port bindings working with rootless containers on podman 1.1.0 git with slirp4netns v0.3.0-alpha2 on Arch Linux (custom local PKGBUILDs). Looking forward to all this getting into stable releases!
